input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.3.3
            TITLE: the powertrain must not regenerate energy when vehicle speed is between 0 and 5 km/hr

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.3.3: The powertrain must not regenerate energy when vehicle speed is between 0 and 5 km/hr
EV.3.3.3 The powertrain must not regenerate energy when vehicle speed is between 0 and 5 km/hr

final_answer: The powertrain must not regenerate energy when vehicle speed is between 0 and 5 km/hr
